name: All-Time Favorite Puff Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly cream together the butter and sugar with the lemon rind.
2. Add the egg yolks to the mixture; beat until light and fluffy.
3. Blend in the lemon juice, flour, cereal, and milk. (The mixture may look curdled, but this will not affect the finished product.)
4. Gently fold in the beaten egg whites into the batter.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 1-quart baking dish.
6. Place the dish in a pan of hot water.
7. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until the top springs back when lightly touched.
8. Serve warm or cold with cream or prepared whipped topping, if desired.
